title: Template Method
subtitle: Fixed skeleton, variable steps — don't call us, we'll call you

panels.heading: vs Strategy
bullets: Template: swap some steps in fixed flow

panels.heading: Key Trap
bullets: Skeleton not stable yet = refactor pain
Too many hooks = skeleton loses meaning
Go: use interface + composition, not inheritance

footer: Template Method = frozen flow, open steps. If caller picks the whole algorithm, that's Strategy.
